## Summary

Restores the Evaluation Mode (Standard / Transgressive / Testimony) and Voice Preservation (Maximum / Balanced / Polished) dropdowns that were removed in `27d0ba9d`. The API route already accepts both fields (`sensitivity_mode`, `voice_preservation_level`) — this just re-adds the UI controls.

## Scope

- `components/evaluation/ManuscriptSubmissionForm.jsx` — re-add state variables, dropdown UI, and API payload threading

Out of scope: API changes (already in place), DB schema (columns already exist).

## Tests Updated

No new tests — restoring previously working UI. API route validation unchanged.

## Visual Evidence

Two `<select>` dropdowns appear between the Manuscript Structure radio buttons and the processing terms checkbox on `/evaluate`.

## Accessibility

Standard `<select>` elements with `<label>` — keyboard accessible, screen-reader friendly.

## Browser Targets

Standard HTML `<select>` — works in all browsers.

## Risks & Anomalies

None — exact restoration of removed code. API + DB already handle both fields with sensible defaults.
